# Reno County Storage

> Affordable, secure self storage in Hutchinson and South Hutchinson, Kansas. Locally owned and operated by Midwest Storage Solutions, LLC.

## About

Reno County Storage offers self storage units at two convenient locations in Reno County, Kansas. We provide month-to-month rentals, 24/7 security monitoring, drive-up access, a free lock with every unit, and a 10% military discount. We are a veteran-owned business.

## Locations

### Hutchinson
- Address: 2511 E 17th Ave, Hutchinson, KS 67501
- Phone: (620) 662-7336
- Hours: Mon-Sat 9am-6pm, Sun Noon-4pm

### South Hutchinson
- Address: 712 N Walnut St, South Hutchinson, KS 67505
- Phone: (620) 662-7336
- Hours: Mon-Sat 9am-6pm, Sun Noon-4pm

## Unit Sizes

- 5x10 (50 sq ft) - Walk-in closet size
- 8x10 (80 sq ft) - Between closet and bedroom
- 10x10 (100 sq ft) - Small bedroom size
- 10x15 (150 sq ft) - Large bedroom size
- 10x20 (200 sq ft) - One-car garage size
- 10x25 (250 sq ft) - Extra-deep unit
- 10x30 (300 sq ft) - Large garage size
- 15x30 (450 sq ft) - Extra-wide storage
- 15x40 (600 sq ft) - Warehouse-sized
- 20x40 (800 sq ft) - Largest available

## Features

- Month-to-month leases with no long-term contracts
- 24/7 security camera monitoring
- Drive-up access at every unit
- Free lock included with every rental
- 10% military discount for active duty and veterans
- Online booking and payments
- Tenant protection plans available ($2,000-$5,000 coverage)
- No hidden fees
